batch_note_anomalous_row_ranges: B-007+ triage row ranges are anomalous. Using date-based extraction. B-007: rows 2229-2580 (352 msgs). B-008: rows 2581-2958 (378 msgs). Continue date-filtering for B-009+.

session_log.notes: First batch (calibration batch). ARC-RF02-001 promoted to ACTIVE. 5 primary flags. CP2 package generated.

CP2 completed. B-002-005 processed (see batch files). B-006: 6 flags including ARC-RF02-004 WATCHING promotion and homework conditional access. B-007: 6 flags including ARC-RF02-002 ACTIVE promotion (7 signals), ARC-RF02-005 CANDIDATE opened, Abby-exclusion visit condition, DND explicit confirmation (ROW-2550). B-008: 6 flags including ROW-2639 (Melissa directly admits personal call blocking), ROW-2899 (third voluntary cutoff suspension). ARC-RF02-004 now has 3 signals (air quality mitigation on third signal). B-009: 7 flags including ROW-3151 (Sev 2, 'I'm the reason she calls you most days' — bidirectional communication control revealed, highest analytical significance of dataset to date) and ROW-2961-2962 (DND confirmed on Melissa's phone). ARC-RF02-002 first Sev 2 signal, max severity elevated. RF-15 Sev 2 (third incest narrative deployment, ROW-3271). B-010: 7 flags; ARC-RF02-005 promoted CANDIDATE→WATCHING (Abby exclusion extended to school pickup, ROW-3546-3547); second explicit Melissa admission of bidirectional call control (ROW-3353-3356); RF-15 Sev 2 x2 (fourth incest narrative deployment ROW-3389; first pedophilia insinuation ROW-3630 — distinct RF-15 escalation pattern). B-011: 1 primary flag (ROW-3780, Sev 1 — cutoff framing language); quietest RF-02 batch to date; multiple cooperative facilitation instances; serves as contrast baseline. B-012: 8 primary flags; ARC-RF02-004 promoted WATCHING→ACTIVE (ROW-4198, 'She can't go to your house,' no justification, Dec 26 2023); fourth explicit bidirectional control confirmation (ROW-4383-4385 — 'She normally only calls because I ask if she wants to or I just dial you'); ARC-RF02-002 signal count now 26; RF-15 Sev 2 (fifth incest narrative, ROW-4094). Arc state fully maintained. B-013+ require date-based extraction. B-013: 5 primary flags (all Sev 1); ARC-RF02-006 CANDIDATE opened (ROW-4588-4589, out-of-state relocation inquiry — 'You still good if we move to NC?'); homework-conditional-access sub-pattern now 4 instances across 9 weeks (B-012–B-013); ARC-RF02-001 returns after 5-month gap with weakest signal (ROW-4785-4789, call timing gate); ARC-RF02-002 signal count now 29; highest-quality cooperative gesture in dataset documented (ROW-4580-4584, airport sign facilitation while sick with flu). 3 peripheral flags (RF-11 legal threat ROW-4613; RF-04 parental delegitimizing ROW-4773-4774; RF-05 derogatory language ROW-4795-4801). B-014: 3 primary flags (all Sev 1, all ARC-RF02-002); contact-conflict relay sub-pattern now distinct — three 'hang up' relay events in 30 days (Apr 4, Apr 8, May 1); ARC-RF02-001/004/005/006 quiet; cat Tahko died Apr 1 — ARC-RF02-004 house restriction naturally suspended (both parties agree); ARC-RF02-002 signal count now 32; ROW-5203 — Eli explicitly named alienation concern ('I need you to do the same'), Melissa dismissed as oversensitivity; 5 cooperative data points including multiple proactive access offers. 3 peripheral flags (RF-04 x3). B-015: 3 primary flags (all Sev 1); ARC-RF02-001 DND confirmed operational May 2024 (ROW-5266, 20-month continuity); ARC-RF02-002 signal count 33; ARC-RF02-006 second NC reference (ROW-5440, vacation sentiment, still CANDIDATE); CRITICAL PERIPHERAL: ROW-5307-5317 RF-15 Sev 2 — most severe false allegation in dataset: sexual assault insinuation against Eli linked explicitly to 'reservations about her staying with you' (access restriction rationale; RF-15 cross-pass priority item); ROW-11919 RF-05 — garden hoe named 'Abby'; 3 cooperative data points including Father's Day facilitation. B-016: 4 primary flags (all Sev 1); notable mechanistic convergence Jun 25-28 — three ARC-RF02 gatekeeping mechanisms in 4-day window (Becky childcare channel restricted ROW-5772, visit access conditioned on prior phone responsiveness + explicit permission framing ROW-5797/5801, phone removal ROW-5802); fourth contact-conflict relay event ROW-5888 (Jul 2); new sub-pattern: parallel contact channel restriction (childcare provider); explicit permission framing ('you're supposed to ask anyhow' ROW-5801) — among clearest direct articulations of required-intermediary dynamic outside the four bidirectional control confirmations; ARC-RF02-001 signal count 24, ARC-RF02-002 signal count 36; ARC-RF02-006 no new NC reference (Canada trip is Niagara Falls); RF-15 Sev 2 peripheral (sixth incest narrative ROW-5863, parenting-credibility delegitimization weaponized to rebuff hospital visit concern); RF-11 peripheral (contempt threats Jun 17); 5 cooperative data points including Father's Day facilitation, birthday gift coordination for Canada trip, Eli facilitating Olivia-grandfather hospital contact. B-017: 2 primary flags (both Sev 1); ARC-RF02-006 promoted CANDIDATE→WATCHING (third NC reference reached — ROW-6018 Jul 16, child preference relay from Canada return, most attenuated signal; all three signals attenuated, no action steps); fifth contact-conflict relay event ROW-6017 (ARC-RF02-002, signal count 37); RF-11 Sev 2 peripheral (ROW-6313 — sole custody threat explicitly to eliminate co-parenting consultation requirements: 'so I don't have to run anything by you as far as daycare or anything' — highest-severity RF-11 and clearest statement of gatekeeping goal at extreme end); ARC-RF02-005 counter-signals — three explicit Abby-inclusive invitations (ROW-6117-6118, ROW-6127-6128, ROW-6501); cooperative co-parenting on Valentina/sex education concern (ROW-6171-6197, high quality). B-018: 2 primary flags (1 Sev 1, 1 Sev 2); ROW-6820 (Aug 21, Sev 2) — Melissa explicitly admits scripting/curating Olivia's conversation content for calls with Eli ('I also give her things to tell you about. I remind her of some of the things she's told me') — new content curation sub-pattern; ARC-RF02-002 signal count 38; ROW-6874-6875 (Aug 27, Sev 1) — sixth contact-conflict relay ('Did you yell at her or something? / She called me crying from the bus' — crying was separation-related not Eli-caused); ARC-RF02-002 signal count 39; 3 peripheral flags (RF-04 x2 parental delegitimizing Aug 8 and Aug 20-21, RF-11 Sev 1 contempt threat Aug 29); 5 cooperative data points — highest facilitation density in dataset (lemonade stand, school shoes, supply drop-off, birthday party, Labor Day weekend offer); ARC-RF02-006 no new signal (ROW-6731 Tennessee not NC). B-019: 3 primary flags (all Sev 1); ROW-7214-7215 (Sep 19) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 40, explicit required-intermediary reassertion ('I tell you that you need to make these plans the night before and instead you made them with her'); ROW-7237 (Sep 21) — ARC-RF02-001 signal 25, phone withheld ('She doesn't have her phone'); ROW-7478 (Oct 3) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 41, fifth bidirectional control confirmation with past-tense shift ('I used to ask her if she wanted to call you in the mornings' — implies prompting practice has ceased); Eli explicitly acknowledges required-intermediary norm (ROW-7206: 'I know better than to make plans with her and not you' — normalization confirmed); 4 peripheral flags (RF-15 Sev 2 physical harm allegations ROW-7161-7169 + ROW-7364-7366 — choking/arm twisting, personal history invoked, cross-pass priority; RF-11 Sev 1 contempt threat Sep 8 + implicit full custody threat Oct 3 ROW-7461; RF-04 Sev 1 extended parental fitness attack Oct 3; RF-05 Sev 1 Abby ROW-7231); Alice (Eli's newborn) born approx. Sep 11-12 2024; Melissa's father hospitalized Sep 12-15+; ARC-RF02-006 no new signal (TN Sevierville vacation booked for Jul 2025, not NC). B-020: 3 primary flags (all Sev 1); ROW-7581 (Oct 24) — ARC-RF02-001 signal 26, DND cutoff shifted from 8:30 to 9:30 PM, enforcement structure unchanged (ROW-7582 sarcastic confirmation); ROW-8672 (Dec 14) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 42, call relay mechanism (Olivia's call request routes through Melissa); ROW-8685 (Dec 15) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 43, sixth explicit required-intermediary enforcement ('Stop talking to her about it before you talk to me'); Eli now pre-enforces the intermediary rule with Olivia herself (ROW-12439: 'I made it clear that you have to be ok with it' — normalization deepens); 5 peripheral flags (RF-05 Abby-blame visit cancellation ROW-7553; RF-04 visit conduct critique ROW-7703; RF-04 sustained engagement dismissal ROW-12344-12353; RF-04 crime stats neighborhood attack ROW-12356; RF-05 derogatory language ROW-8678); 4 cooperative data points (visit options offered, drone event shift offer, HPV vaccine consultation, detailed illness update + weight/height); ARC-RF02-006 no new signal; no arc lifecycle transitions. B-021: 2 primary flags (both Sev 1); ROW-8734-8735 (Dec 21) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 44, seventh contact-relay accusation ('You know she keeps wanting to talk to you and you keep hanging up to do other things' — misleading: Dec 27 context reveals Melissa was calling to show Meta gameplay, not Olivia initiating); ROW-8909 (Jan 8) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 45, visit relay + conditional framing ('I'll ask her when she wakes up / She said sure for tomorrow but you better do something fun'); 3 peripheral flags (RF-05 Sev 1 ROW-8721 'We don't want to see yo ass'; RF-04 Sev 1 Jan 5 sustained competence attack ROW-8865-8877; RF-04 Sev 2 Jan 8 ROW-8914-8927 'She deserves a better father / Unfortunately that's not something I think you will ever give her' — most severe RF-04 in dataset, cross-pass priority); 5 cooperative data points including Christmas gift warmth, Dec 31 emotional sensitivity co-parenting discussion, snow day proactive access offer; no arc lifecycle transitions. B-022: 2 primary flags (both Sev 1); ROW-8952 (Jan 16) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 46, phone access refusal mediated through Melissa during visit-cancellation escalation cascade ('She sais she doesn't want to talk on the phone to you today because you upset her and she wants me to tell you to leave her alone tonight'); ROW-9098-9099 (Feb 14) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 47, seventh explicit required-intermediary enforcement ('She shouldn't have to tell you to ask me / You should be doing that before ask her'); CRITICAL DEVELOPMENT: Olivia herself (ROW-9096) redirected Eli to seek Melissa's approval for Valentine's Day pickup — normalization trajectory complete at child level; 3 peripheral flags (RF-04 Sev 2 ROW-7727-8960 Jan 15-16 'sperm donor / biggest mistake I've ever made in my life' — back-to-back Sev 2 RF-04 within 8 days; RF-15 Sev 3 ROW-8961-8966 Jan 16 — first explicit pedophilia/grooming allegation in dataset, third-party witnesses named, directly connected to access restriction rationale 'I should be happy you have limited time around Olivia' — HIGHEST SEVERITY ITEM IN DATASET, RF-15 cross-pass priority; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-9081-9082 Feb 10 birthday failure historical attack); 3 cooperative data points (tetanus vaccine coordination, May 29 school last-day pickup facilitation, choir practice advance notice); ARC-RF02-001/004/005/006 no new signals; no arc lifecycle transitions. B-023: 1 primary flag (Sev 1); ROW-9131/9141-9143 (Feb 15) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 48, required-intermediary extension into affective communication domain ('Her being nervous to talk to you isn't new... I told you she wanted me to call and talk to you about something because she was afraid to talk to you' / 'She didn't feel comfortable talking to you about it. She asked me to. That's why I'm involved'); Eli explicitly rejects extension (ROW-9133/9137/9144: 'I don't need a mediated conversation' — first on-record rejection of intermediary claim, contrasting with full internalization of scheduling intermediary norm); 2 peripheral flags (RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-9116-9118 Feb 15 chair dispute 'You are ruining her self esteem and self worth / she gets the bare minimum from you' — new Milo/Alice comparison element; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-9279 Mar 1 'Plans more important than Olivia'); 4 cooperative data points (Feb 22 chair dispute resolution + Melissa acknowledgment; Feb 24 proactive Eli-access offer school-free Friday; Mar 1 double birthday party facilitation; Mar 3 medical emergency cooperative response — Melissa kidney stone); highest facilitation density since B-018; no arc lifecycle transitions. B-024: 1 primary flag (Sev 1); ROW-9466-9468 (Apr 13) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 49, eighth contact-relay accusation ('She's in the meta / She said you took so long that now she's on the vr' — Melissa narrates Olivia's VR switch after Eli was in the bathroom <10 min; softest contact-relay instance in arc); 3 peripheral flags (RF-05 Sev 1 ROW-7777 Mar 4 'Sounds like the abster just doesn't want you going' — Abby-blame for Eli not attending Olivia's birthday party; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-7786-7796/9371/9401 Mar 10-13 cluster during Melissa surgery recovery 'Having surgery so you will need to be a parent to our child / lack of involvement with your first born'; RF-15 Sev 1 ROW-9485 Apr 28 news link about local custodian arrested for crimes involving minor — implied association in B-022 RF-15 Sev 3 context); 4 cooperative data points (Mar 9 dinner offer, Saturday childcare coordination with Eli as preferred caretaker, spring fling facilitation + homework encouragement, Apr 26 recital photo sharing); Eli continues internalized required-intermediary norm (ROW-9409: 'Did she want me to pick her up after work?'); no arc lifecycle transitions. B-025: 1 primary flag (Sev 1); ROW-9660 (May 21) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 50, required-intermediary extension into therapeutic/counseling domain ('I asked if she wanted to call you to tell you about the call and she said yes and told me to call' — Melissa as conduit for Olivia's counseling experience); ANALYTICALLY SIGNIFICANT CA-RF02-02 challenge: Eli bypasses relay and calls Olivia directly (ROW-9661), Olivia says she does not want to discuss the counseling session — divergence between relay claim and direct child response; required-intermediary pattern now documented in scheduling, affective, and therapeutic domains; Melissa unilaterally enrolled Olivia in counseling May 19 (RF-07 cross-pass item); 3 peripheral flags (RF-05 Sev 1 ROW-9523/9571 May 4 Cosi dispute Abby-delegitimization 'Abby literally called her rude... that psycho'; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-9540-9541/9558-9562 May 4 ring-clutching abandonment framing + illness-absence weaponized; RF-11 Sev 1 ROW-9536 May 4 'Otherwise it's harassment and I will file harassment'); 4 cooperative data points (canker sore coordination, Melissa dating support exchange, Memorial Day extended visit, school last-day authorized pickup); Melissa discloses new relationship May 28 — parenting plan compliance discussion cooperative; no arc lifecycle transitions. B-026: 1 primary flag (Sev 1); ROW-9743 (Jun 8) — ARC-RF02-002 signal 51, safety-domain relay ('She told me she wanted me to talk to you about it which is what I'm doing' — Melissa as conduit for Olivia's reported feeling of being unsafe at Eli's house); CA-RF02-02 with narrative-priming: ROW-9739 reveals Melissa's triggering question 'I asked if you were just going to threaten her' — leading question precedes relay; required-intermediary pattern now in scheduling, affective, therapeutic, and safety domains; 3 peripheral flags (RF-05 Sev 1 ROW-9735/9736/9738/9750 Jun 7-8 Abby-laughed/Abby-pinches/you act like an asshole + Jun 27 Abby-liar vindication; RF-15 Sev 1 ROW-9735/9739/9744 Jun 7-8 Olivia-source physical harm insinuation with leading question visible; RF-07 Sev 1 ROW-9765-9768/7873-7879 Jun 13-14 boyfriend introduction over parenting plan objection 'I'm not asking for permission'); 4 cooperative data points; fourth NC reference (ROW-9782 Jun 16 OBX vacation address Corolla NC) — vacation context; no arc lifecycle transitions. B-027: 0 primary flags — quietest RF-02 batch to date; Jul 1 – Aug 2 2025 (498 messages); dominated by extremely high cooperative density: Olivia's birthday float plane facilitation Jul 15, sustained vacation illness coordination Jul 16 (100+ messages), tap dance open house invitation, school supply coordination; ARC-RF02-001 quiet for 10 consecutive batches (B-021-B-027, Dec 2024–Aug 2025); 3 peripheral flags (RF-11 Sev 2 ROW-9957-9960 Jul 19 full custody threat during Melissa ER visit — Eli declined last-minute extension request; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-9947/9952/9964 Jul 19 '2.5 hours' parenting minimization + 'She deserves so much better'; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-14021 Aug 2 parental absence article); ARC-RF02-006 TN vacation confirmed Sevierville (anticipated from B-019 monitor note); no arc lifecycle transitions. B-028: 4 primary flags (Aug 3 – Sep 12 2025, 487 messages); highest primary-flag density since B-020; 3 new ARC-RF02-002 signals (52-54): Aug 26 visit-refusal relay (ROW-14208), Aug 29 explicit first-person self-characterization of required-intermediary role (ROW-8173 'That's why I helped facilitate a conversation between you two about how she feels since she is afraid to talk to you about things' — Sev 2), Sep 3-5 multi-day visit-refusal cascade (ROW-14310-14315); 1 new ARC-RF02-006 signal (4): ROW-14083 Aug 14 'Also I've been looking at houses and may move soon' — first action-step language, satisfies housing-inquiry promotion criterion; ARC-RF02-006 promoted WATCHING→ACTIVE; 3 peripheral flags (RF-11 Sev 2 ROW-14154-14155 Aug 14 full custody threat 'Already been talking to the lawyer about it'; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-14080/14097/14157 Aug 14 cluster; RF-15 Sev 1 ROW-14295 Sep 2 'Why are you smacking her?'); ARC-RF02-001 quiet 11 consecutive batches (B-021–B-028); required-intermediary domain extension trajectory now spans 5 domains: scheduling → affective → therapeutic → safety → visit-access control; ARC-RF02-002 signal count advances to 54. B-029: 3 primary flags (Sep 14 – Oct 31 2025, 483 messages); Signal 55 (ROW-14354, Sep 17, Sev 1): homework-conditional-access 5th instance — 'If you can't follow thru on homework she won't be able to go there during the week anymore'; Signal 56 (ROW-14495-14496, Oct 4, Sev 2): safety/fear relay with intermediary-channel protection instruction — 'begging me not to tell you cause she's so afraid of you... not be yelling at her for telling me'; Signal 57 (ROW-14523-14541, Oct 10, Sev 1): weekend visit-refusal cascade — 'Olivia said don't bother coming'; 4 peripheral flags (RF-11 Sev 2 ROW-14371 Sep 17 'agreement ready to sign to get it started' — most concrete legal-action language in dataset; RF-11 Sev 1 cluster Sep 14-28 four contempt threats in 14 days; RF-04 Sev 1 cluster Sep-Oct; RF-05 Sev 1 Abby relay cluster); ARC-RF02-001 quiet 12 consecutive batches; ARC-RF02-006 Canada vacation (Niagara Falls) — proactively notified, not relocation signal; ARC-RF02-002 signal count advances to 57. B-030: 3 primary flags (Nov 2 2025 – Jan 2 2026, 415 messages); Signal 58 (ROW-14756/14773/8424, Nov 7-8, Sev 2): visit-refusal relay + 'She said she doesn't want to spend the night with you for the next 5 years' + physical refusal-at-threshold (ROW-8424); Signal 59 (ROW-14789-14849, Nov 18-25, Sev 1): multi-weekend refusal relay with explicit fault-framing ('Not my fault she doesn't want to go. You need to fix the things she says she's upset about'); Signal 60 (ROW-14866-14870, Dec 1, Sev 1): Melissa explicitly positions as broker-intermediary conditioning Eli's parenting time on remediation of relayed grievances; 3 peripheral flags (RF-11 Sev 2 ROW-14841-14852 Nov 25 'contempt for all the times you chose not to have visitation' — legal paradox: threatens contempt for missed visits caused by Melissa's own relayed refusals; RF-11 Sev 1 ROW-14752 full-custody evidence framing; RF-04 Sev 1 ROW-14800-14801 'piece of shit' during cancer biopsy disclosure); ARC-RF02-001 quiet 13 consecutive batches; ARC-RF02-002 signal count advances to 60. B-031: 5 primary flags (Jan 8 – Apr 12 2026, 477 messages); Signal 61 (ROW-14978/14984, Jan 10, Sev 2): 9th explicit required-intermediary enforcement, domain extended to daily behavior reporting — 'You should talk to me about these things instead of her'; Signal 62 (ROW-15098-15109, Feb 15-16, Sev 2): post-Valentine's indefinite weekend-pause relay — 'She said she doesn't want to go to your house on weekends at all... would like to pause weekends for awhile' — highest scope claim in arc; Signal 63 (ROW-15179-15185, Mar 9, Sev 1): 'She said you traumatized her and she's still not ready to go back to your house yet' — new escalation language; Signal 64 (ROW-15510/15513, Apr 2-3, Sev 1): 10th explicit enforcement during reconciliation attempt; ARC-RF02-001 Signal 27 (ROW-15508, Apr 1, Sev 1): Melissa witnesses Olivia actively flipping Eli to voicemail — resumes arc after 17-month quiet streak; 3 peripheral flags (RF-04 Sev 2 ROW-15499-15500 Mar 28 Milo/Alice love comparison relay; RF-15 Sev 1 ROW-15589-15597 Apr 12 bruise inquiry reframed as abuse allegation against Melissa; RF-11 Sev 1 Feb-Mar contempt cluster); 5 cooperative data points including Lion King musical coordination (Olivia attended Apr 9-12). RF-02 PASS COMPLETE: 31 batches, 13,879 messages, 101 primary flags, 92 peripheral flags, 4 active arcs (ARC-RF02-001: 27 signals; ARC-RF02-002: 64 signals; ARC-RF02-004: 4 signals; ARC-RF02-006: 4 signals). Ready for Phase 2 (RC-PATTERN-SYNTHESIS.md).
